'''Orcon's trident''' was a [[Trident/Legends|trident]] used by [[Orcon/Legends|Orcon]] to control his pet [[Devil serpent/Legends|devil serpent]]. It is unknown if the trident managed this through [[The Force/Legends|magical]] means, technology, or if the serpent was simply trained to obey the verbal commands of the wielder, whoever he might be.

==Appearances==
*[[Ewoks (1985) 9|''Ewoks'' (1985) 9]] {{1st}}
